paragraphs: Looking for fresh ideas to update your wood-burning fireplace? Explore this page for inspiration on transforming your outdated fireplace into a stunning centerpiece that brings warmth, coziness and convenience to your home.

Our collaborations with tastemakers, influencers and media partners bring fire to the forefront. Together, we create and highlight spaces that not only warm homes but also spark inspiration for your own fireplace project. Explore how our collaborations redefine comfortable living.
Whether you’re building in a development or working with an architect, adding a fireplace to your new-home plan is a step you shouldn’t skip.
Explore our fireplace ideas photo gallery and be inspired by modern and traditional gas and electric fireplace designs for indoors and outdoors.

Achieve the warm glow and heat of a traditional fireplace without the need for a chimney or a gas line. Our electric fireplaces are easy to install and create a cozy, warm ambiance in any room. Explore this page for electric fireplace ideas and inspiration.
Bright ideas start here. Browse for expert design advice, product news and stories from behind the scenes.
